V0532_01_00_02_0.text: Remove your training wheels if you want to keep up with me!

V0532_34_00_00_0.text: The King's Duel must always entertain!

V0532_03_00_00_0.text: There's nothing left you can do!

V0532_03_00_01_0.text: The finish line is within sight!

V0532_03_00_02_0.text: Don't expect me to slow down!

V0532_03_00_04_0.text: Victory is to be taken, not given!

V0532_03_00_05_0.text: Humph! Your moves are nothing special!

V0532_06_01_01_0.text: You best try harder than that!

V0532_07_09_01_0.text: I flip over my face-down card!

V0532_08_00_00_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Scarlet Security!

V0532_08_00_01_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Resonator Call!

V0532_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Mind Trust!

V0532_08_00_04_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Red Dragon Vase!

V0532_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Resonator Engine!

V0532_08_00_09_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Assault Teleport!

V0532_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Assault Revival!

V0532_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
King Scarlet!

V0532_08_00_14_0.text:
I reveal my Trap Card!
Synchro Call!

V0532_08_00_15_0.text:
I reveal my Trap Card!
Synchro Deflector!

V0532_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Red Cocoon!

V0532_08_00_17_0.text: I activate my Continuous Trap, Red Screen!

V0532_08_00_18_0.text: I activate my Continuous Trap, Spacegate!

V0532_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Changing Destiny!

V0532_08_00_20_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Tuner Capture!

V0532_08_00_21_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Fiendish Chain!

V0532_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Nightmare Archfiends!

V0532_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Half or Nothing!

V0532_08_00_24_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Assault Mode Activate!

V0532_08_00_25_0.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Prideful Roar!

V0532_08_00_26_0.text: I activate my Trap, Reject Reborn!

V0532_08_00_27_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Revival Gift!

V0532_08_00_28_0.text: I activate the Trap, Red Supremacy!

V0532_08_00_29_0.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Descending Lost Star!

V0532_08_00_30_0.text: I activate my Continuous Trap, Shadow Spell!

V0532_08_00_31_0.text: I activate my Trap Card, King's Consonance!

V0532_08_00_33_0.text: I activate my Continuous Trap, Powerful Rebirth!

V0532_08_00_34_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Lineage of Destruction!

V0532_08_00_35_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Red Carpet!

V0532_08_00_36_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Assault Slash!

V0532_08_00_37_0.text:
My Counter Trap activates!
Assault Counter!

V0532_09_00_03_0.text:
Red Nova Dragon!
Activate your effect!

V0532_09_00_08_0.text: Majestic Red Dragon's effect absorbs your monster's ATK!

V0532_09_00_14_0.text: I activate Barrier Resonator's effect from my hand!

V0532_09_00_17_0.text: Medium Piece Golem Special Summons a monster from my deck!

V0532_09_00_19_1.text: I Special Summon it from my hand!

V0532_09_00_20_0.text: I send Red Gardna from my hand to the Graveyard!

V0532_09_00_20_1.text: Now your effects can't destroy my monsters this turn!

V0532_09_00_21_1.text: I Special Summon a Level 3 or lower Fiend-Type Tuner!

V0532_09_00_22_0.text: Scarlight Red Dragon Archfiend's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_23_0.text: Tyrant Red Dragon Archfiend's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_24_0.text: Tyrant Red Dragon Archfiend's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_25_0.text: Red Dragon Archfiend/Assault Mode's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_26_0.text: Red Dragon Archfiend/Assault Mode! Resurrect my monster!

V0532_09_00_31_0.text: Red Rising Dragon! Activate your effect!

V0532_09_00_33_0.text: Red Wyvern destroys the monster with the most ATK!

V0532_09_00_34_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend Abyss's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_35_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend Bane's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_36_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_37_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend King Calamity's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_38_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend King Calamity's effect activates!

V0532_09_00_43_0.text: Celestial Wolf Lord, Blue Sirius's effect!

V0532_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0532_37_00_00_0.text: As the King roars, feel the crushing blow of victory!

V0532_37_00_01_0.text: This red blade announces the King's verdict!

V0532_37_00_01_1.text: Surge with the flames as I Synchro Summon!

V0532_37_00_02_0.text: And the fire deep down below in the earth...

V0532_37_00_02_1.text: Collide in a cosmic explosion to Synchro Summon!

V0532_37_00_03_0.text: With the wings of wind, I Synchro Summon!

V0532_37_00_04_0.text: This light shines upon the land as its true conqueror!

V0532_13_00_08_0.text: I give you Majestic Red Dragon!

V0532_37_00_05_0.text: The new sovereign emerges from the chaos!

V0532_13_00_20_0.text: Combine and form Multiple Piece Golem!

V0532_37_00_06_0.text: From the ancient chasms of a lost world...

V0532_37_00_06_1.text:
I awake a great and terrible power!
Synchro Summon!

V0532_13_00_26_0.text: Rise, my Scarlight Red Dragon Archfiend!

V0532_37_00_07_1.text: I call forth an absolute power destined to rule this Duel!

V0532_13_00_27_0.text: Bow down in terror before Tyrant Red Dragon Archfiend!

V0532_13_00_28_0.text: The conqueror emerges, clad in scorching armor!

V0532_13_00_28_1.text: Appear before me, Red Dragon Archfiend/Assault Mode!

V0532_37_00_08_0.text: Witness why I am known as the true King!

V0532_37_00_09_0.text: My crimson dragon shines upon the infernal path!

V0532_37_00_11_0.text: The king of the dark abyss unleashes its rage!

V0532_37_00_12_0.text: Mountains will crumble as the land is engulfed in flames!

V0532_37_00_13_0.text: Scorch the earth and stand at the apex of existence!

V0532_37_00_13_1.text:
Rule over all of creation!
Synchro Summon!

V0532_37_00_14_1.text: The ultimate destroyer arrives to bring your demise!

V0532_13_00_38_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend King Calamity!

V0532_13_00_39_0.text: Come forth, Gash the Dust Lord!

V0532_13_00_41_0.text:
The Tuner Monster arrives!
Majestic Dragon!

V0532_13_00_42_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Phantom King Hydride!

V0532_13_00_43_0.text: Here comes Absolute King Back Jack!

V0532_37_00_15_0.text: The star of doom comes to judge all living things!

V0532_37_00_16_0.text: The lone wolf with blue eyes incinerates the heavens!

V0532_37_00_16_1.text:
Show these lapdogs who bears the fangs!
Synchro Summon!

V0532_16_00_01_0.text: Feel the roar of the mighty!

V0532_19_00_06_0.text:
Stardust Dragon!
I command you to attack!

V0532_19_00_35_0.text: Attack, Hot Red Dragon Archfiend Abyss!

V0532_19_00_36_0.text: Attack, Hot Red Dragon Archfiend Bane!

V0532_19_00_38_0.text: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend King Calamity, break their spirit!

V0532_19_00_45_0.text: Celestial Wolf Lord, Blue Sirius attacks!

V0532_28_00_00_0.text: There's only one King! And you're looking at him!

V0532_28_00_01_0.text: Duel with your own style instead of copying others!

V0532_29_00_01_0.text:
Humph!
I won't lose next time!

V0532_33_00_00_0.text: The King never lets an opportunity pass!

V0532_36_00_00_0.text: Let them know that this Duel is over!

V0532_36_00_02_0.text: I leave my fate to you!
